summary: Store Closed Status Feature Testing Complete. Backend APIs correctly return is_open and open_status fields. Frontend properly displays closed store banner, disables add buttons, and shows grayscale effect on store detail page. Store 'مطعم الشام' (ID: 421443ed-55d6-4f1e-990a-2f3f53b2427e) correctly shows as closed since Syria time (~2AM) is outside working hours (8AM-11PM).

issues: Minor: Only 4 stores shown (slice 0,4), closed stores sorted last so may not be visible on main page. Users need to click 'عرض الكل' which leads to missing /food/stores page.

action_items: MINOR: Create /food/stores page or update 'عرض الكل' link to show more stores
critical_code_review_comments: Backend food.py lines 106-185: get_food_stores correctly calculates is_open based on Syria timezone (+3) and working_hours
Backend food.py lines 213-270: get_food_store correctly adds is_open for single store detail
Frontend FoodPage.js StoreCard lines 371-461: Correctly shows grayscale, closed badge, cursor-not-allowed for closed stores
Frontend FoodStorePage.js lines 127-141: Correctly shows red 'المتجر مغلق حالياً' banner for closed stores
Frontend FoodStorePage.js ProductCard lines 313-362: Add buttons correctly disabled (isStoreClosed check) with gray styling
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing store 'مطعم الشام' with working_hours configured
context_for_next_testing_agent: Store Closed Status feature fully working. Backend returns is_open/open_status based on Syria timezone (+3). Frontend shows: 1) Red banner 'المتجر مغلق حالياً', 2) Grayscale store image, 3) Disabled add buttons with toast message when clicked. Test store: مطعم الشام (421443ed-55d6-4f1e-990a-2f3f53b2427e) with working hours 8AM-11PM Syria time.

GET_food_stores_is_open.verification: Returns is_open and open_status for all stores. Open stores sorted first.

GET_food_store_single_is_open.verification: Returns is_open=false and open_status='يفتح الساعة 08:00' for closed store

frontend_closed_banner.verification: Red banner shows 'المتجر مغلق حالياً' with next open time

frontend_disabled_add_buttons.verification: Buttons disabled=true, has gray class, cursor-not-allowed

frontend_toast_on_add_attempt.verification: Toast shows 'المتجر مغلق - لا يمكنك الطلب حالياً، يرجى العودة عندما يفتح المتجر'

frontend_store_card_closed_visual.verification: Closed stores show grayscale, 'مغلق الآن' badge, not clickable (cursor-not-allowed)
